name: speckit-dtfs
description: Spec Kit extension for design-to-fullstack. Adds platform mapping, DeltaSpec production, control plane pre-apply, and codegen contract templates.
author: dtfs

templates.name: platform-mapping
templates.description: Template for mapping Requirements to Control Plane targets (Entity, Operation, Policy, Screen, Behavior).

templates.name: delta-spec
templates.description: Checklist and skeleton for producing a canonical DeltaSpec from an accepted PlatformSpecProposal.

templates.name: control-plane-checklist
templates.description: Pre-apply checklist covering all gates (validity, changeset, coverage, governance) before calling apply_spec.

templates.name: dtfs-codegen-contract
templates.description: Contract specifying what the dtfs codegen consumes, produces, and guarantees.

install.instructions: Copy this directory into your project's `.speckit/extensions/speckit-dtfs/`. Reference templates by name in your Spec Kit configuration.
